title: Samsung Is the New Memory Chip Underdog—for Now
summary: A sell-off in the triumvirate of memory chip stocks this month—Samsung, SK Hynix and Micron Technology—has presented investors with a fresh opportunity to get exposure to the fast-growing sector. One solution for investors is to opt for the cheapest stock.
